Monkey and Banana Room to Read
Mother monkey goes out to search for food for Little Monkey.
Little monkey wakes up and calls out "I’m so hungry! I want to eat a banana."
He decides to go looking for a banana on his own.
Little Monkey meets a snake and asks: "Snake, is there a banana palm around here?"
Snake replies, "No, I live in a hole and have never seen any." Little Monkey thanks Snake and leaves.
Little monkey went on his way and met a tiger: "Tiger, are there any bananas here?"
Tiger replies, "No. I live in the big forest and have never seen any." Little monkey thanks Tiger and leaves.
Little monkey goes on his way and meets a fish. He asks: "Fish, are there any bananas here?"
Fish replies, "No. I live in the water and have never seen any." Little monkey thanks the fish. Now the monkey is getting very hungry.
Little monkey goes on his way and meets an egret. He asks, "Egret, are there any bananas here?"
Egret replies, "Yes. Near the creek, there are banana palms. I fly over and always see them."
Little monkey goes towards the banana palms and sees his mother bringing bananas home.
Little monkey is happy to see his mom and eats the delicious bananas.
